Extraordinary Rescue

非凡营救

4.0
2023MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Military instructor Zhang Zhen becomes embroiled in a murder case, forcing him to go on the run. With help, he finds a survivor and investigates, uncovering connections to human trafficking and a military group while seeking the truth.
